distance_km.note: Event offers self-timed races of about 6 or 12 miles (approx. 9.7 or 19.3 km), not 25 km (15.5 miles); 25 km outside ±3 km tolerance of 19.3 km

elevation_m.note: No reliable sources found specifying total elevation gain; event on McKenzie Pass but no numeric data

country.note: Event held in Oregon, USA, which matches country but database specifies Washington state below; country correct but context mismatches

region_state_province.note: Event near Sisters, Oregon, on McKenzie Pass, not Washington

discipline.note: Groomed for both skate and classic skiing

field_size.note: No sources provide typical number of participants; low-cost event but no numeric data

founded.note: First edition in 1934; tradition since 1930s, taken over by Oregon Nordic Club in 1972

official_website.note: Organized by Oregon Nordic Club (onc.org); Mountaineers.org not referenced

race_date.note: Typically mid-March (e.g., March 16 2024, March 15 2025), aligns with February/March winter timing
